shared_attributes.design_principle: minimal pixel representation, clear at tiny scale

context.role: waste object that spawns on floor, triggers dirty state when 3+ present, removed by cleaning
context.usage_scenario: spawns every 20 minutes, max 5 visible, 3+ triggers Echo dirty state, player swipes floor to remove all

animation.description: static sprite, no animation, spawns at random floor positions, removed all at once when cleaned

visual_specification.details: brown color (#AB5236) matching perch/bowls, 2x2px irregular shape, spawns at random x positions on floor (y=110-125), max 5 instances visible simultaneously

relationships.shared_with: shares brown color (#AB5236) with perch and bowls
relationships.differences_from: spawnable object (appears over time), triggers gameplay state (dirty), removed by player action (cleaning), unlike static environment elements

explicit_negations: no smell lines or stink effects
no individual removal (all cleaned at once)
